detectors.description:
Reentrancy in PreSaleFund.Divest(uint256) (PreSaleFund.sol#67-83):
	External calls:
	- this.loggedTransfer(amount,,msg.sender,owner) (PreSaleFund.sol#77)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- investors[msg.sender] -= amount (PreSaleFund.sol#79)
	PreSaleFund.investors (PreSaleFund.sol#19) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- PreSaleFund.Divest(uint256) (PreSaleFund.sol#67-83)
	- PreSaleFund.GetInvestedAmount() (PreSaleFund.sol#105-117)
	- PreSaleFund.Invest() (PreSaleFund.sol#47-63)
